hero.title: Karel Puerto Díaz
hero.subtitle: Sr. FullStack Developer | AI & Cloud Specialist | Mexico
hero.description: Specialist in SaaS platforms, payment systems, AWS serverless architectures, LLMs and multi-agent AI systems

about.title: About Me
about.feature2Desc: Lambda, ECS, S3, RDS, API Gateway
about.paragraph1: Senior FullStack Developer with extensive experience in the full lifecycle of application development and IT solutions. Specialist in creating SaaS platforms, payment systems, and complex integrations with payment gateways and third-party APIs.
about.paragraph2: Expert in serverless architectures with AWS (Lambda, ECS, S3, RDS, API Gateway), development of systems with LLMs (GPT-4, Claude), implementation of RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation), and orchestration of autonomous agents with LangChain and LangGraph.
about.paragraph3: Technical leader with experience in team management, database optimization, and improving business productivity. Background in Mathematics - Computer Science with international experience in Cuba and Mexico.
